title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: **Hardening + Note Regeneration Verification Checklist** 1. Run core slide hardening suite. `cd /Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide && npm test` Receipt: all unit/e2e scripts pass, especially `test-unit-variant-matrix.js`, `test-unit-slide-finish.js`, `test-unit-manus-slide-generator.js`. 2. Run script-prep adapter gate suite. `node /Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/test-orchestrator-adapter.js` Receipt: tests covering `selection_required`/`route_ready` and artifact contract pass. 3. Generate prep artifacts for the note rerun. `node /Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js --action prepare --output-dir <RUN_DIR> --topic "<note topic>" --source-url "https://note.com/nice_wren7963/n/n323e2d757a50" --source-kind note --context 解説` Then: `node /Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js --action check --output-dir <RUN_DIR>` Receipts must exist: `brief.json`, `research.json`, `script-lock.md`, `deck-spec.json`, `asset-plan.json`, `routing-decision.json`, `workflow-decision.json`. 4. Enforce routing gate before render. `jq -e '.route_ready==true and .selection_required==false and .route_skill_final=="slide"' <RUN_DIR>/workflow-decision.json` Receipt: gate passes; otherwise render is blocked. 5. Run dual-variant delivery. `node /Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js --input <RUN_DIR>/content.json --delivery-dir <RUN_DIR>/delivery --deck-spec <RUN_DIR>/deck-spec.json --asset-plan <RUN_DIR>/asset-plan.json --workflow-decision <RUN_DIR>/workflow-decision.json` Receipts must exist: `delivery/variant-matrix.json`, `delivery/variants/structured-native/*`, `delivery/variants/nanobanana-*/ *`. 6. Verify medical-keyword hardening is effective. `rg -n "Sensitive content detected: medical" <RUN_DIR>/delivery/variants/*/inspection-report.json` Receipt: no hit for generic medical explainer runs. 7. Verify provider-failure classification (if Manus lane fails). `jq -e '.blocking_issues[]?.type | test("^manus-provider-|manus-render-failure$")' <RUN_DIR>/delivery/variants/nanobanana-*/inspection-report.json` Receipt: failure type is explicit provider/render class, not “thin content” ambiguity. 8. Verify native PASS invariants. `jq -e '.status=="PASS" and .checks.expected_slide_count==.checks.rendered_slide_count and .checks.rendered_slide_count==.checks.pdf_page_count and .checks.font_embedded==true' <RUN_DIR>/delivery/variants/structured-native/delivery-gate.json` Receipt: count parity + embedded font check true. 9. Verify adaptive Manus progress receipt. `test -f <RUN_DIR>/delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/progress.json || test -f <RUN_DIR>/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/progress.json` Receipt: progress file exists with observable statuses. 10. Finalize selected variant (required to close contract). `node /Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-finish.js --delivery-dir <RUN_DIR>/delivery --variant <selected_variant> [--allow-preview-only]` Final receipts must exist: `delivery/final/delivery-gate.selected.json`, `delivery/final/selected-variant.json`, and canonical `delivery/final/output.pdf` (+ `output.pptx` when selected variant is PASS, not preview-only).
